summary: Comprehensive testing of BM Hospitality Dynamic Image System (Iteration 4). All 21 backend API tests passed 100%. Frontend verified: Hero, Gallery, and Offers sections successfully display dynamic admin-uploaded images. Admin panel login, image upload, and image manager working correctly. Contact/inquiry form submission verified.

issues: Test images (red 1x1 pixel PNG) currently displayed - should be replaced with actual travel photos
Test image (red background) currently displayed - should be replaced with actual hero banner image

action_items: Admin should upload proper travel images to replace test images in hero and gallery sections
critical_code_review_comments: Dynamic image system correctly implemented using useAdminImages hook
Public API /api/images/{section} returns images for all valid sections
File serving /api/files/{path} correctly serves uploaded images
Soft delete implemented - deleted images don't appear in public or admin lists
Frontend components (Hero, Gallery, Packages, BohraStay, OffersDeals) properly fallback to stock photos when no admin images exist
Newsletter popup blocks interactions - consider adding delay before showing or making it dismissible with keyboard
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed images uploaded via pytest to hero, gallery, domestic-packages, international-packages, goa-hotels, bohra-stays, offers sections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic image system fully tested and working. Components using useAdminImages: Hero.jsx, Gallery.jsx, Packages.jsx (domestic/international/goa), BohraStay.jsx, OffersDeals.jsx. Test images currently visible in hero and gallery - admin should upload proper images. All backend APIs working: /api/images/{section}, /api/files/{path}, /api/admin/upload, /api/admin/images, DELETE /api/admin/images/{id}

features_verified.admin_login: PASS - POST /api/admin/login with Nawabi@2025 returns token
features_verified.admin_upload: PASS - POST /api/admin/upload uploads and stores image in DB
features_verified.file_serving: PASS - GET /api/files/{storage_path} serves uploaded file content
features_verified.admin_images_list: PASS - GET /api/admin/images returns all uploaded images
features_verified.hero_dynamic_image: PASS - Hero section displays admin-uploaded image from /api/files/
features_verified.admin_image_manager_ui: PASS - Upload form, section dropdown, image grid all working
features_verified.contact_form_submission: PASS - Contact form submits data to backend

dynamic_image_integration_verified.upload_to_public_flow: PASS - Upload image via admin -> appears in public /api/images/{section} -> servable via /api/files/{path}
dynamic_image_integration_verified.delete_removes_from_public: PASS - Deleted images don't appear in public API
dynamic_image_integration_verified.frontend_url_construction: PASS - Frontend correctly constructs URL as {BACKEND_URL}/api/files/{storage_path}
